expected_outputs.diagnosis: Reproduced locally on Python 3.10. Root cause: tomllib is stdlib only on 3.11+. The build matrix still includes 3.10.
expected_outputs.fix_proposal:
diff --git a/pyproject.toml b/pyproject.toml
@@ require python >= 3.11 or vendor tomli for 3.10 @@

notes: Records the failing check id, reproduces locally, and proposes a fix with validating evidence.
